notes: To add a new year: find the species under harvest_by_species, and append new records to the records array.
WMU-based species use year (int), wmu (string), male, female, young, total, success_rate_percent.
Wood bison is province-level only — no WMU breakdown. Uses season_year (string e.g. 2025-26), season_status, licences_issued, total_harvest, success_rate_percent.
Antelope uses wmu_group instead of wmu due to source report format.
